newYearSale.name: HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW
newYearSale.description: The HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW is a high-performance monochrome laser printer designed for small to medium-sized businesses.
newYearSale.fullDescription:
The HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW is a high-performance monochrome laser printer designed for small to medium-sized businesses. With a print speed of up to 40 pages per minute (ppm) and automatic duplex printing, it ensures fast and efficient output. The HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW delivers sharp and professional-quality prints with a resolution of 1200 x 1200 dpi. It features built-in Wi-Fi, Ethernet, and USB connectivity, offering seamless integration into office networks and mobile printing via HP Smart App. Compact and ENERGY STAR certified, the HP LaserJet Pro 4003dw is an eco-friendly choice for reliable and cost-effective printing.
    Print Technology: Laser Resolution: Up to 1200 x 1200 dpi Print Speed: Up to 40 ppm (black) Connectivity: USB 2.0, Ethernet, Wi-Fi Paper Handling: Automatic duplex printing, 250-sheet input tray Monthly Duty Cycle: Up to 80,000 pages Eco-Friendly: ENERGY STAR certified

newYearSale.name: STARLINK STANDARD KIT
newYearSale.description: The Starlink Standard Kit delivers high-speed, low-latency satellite internet, powered by SpaceX's advanced LEO satellite network.
newYearSale.fullDescription: The Starlink Standard Kit delivers high-speed, low-latency satellite internet, powered by SpaceX's advanced LEO satellite network. Designed for residential users and remote locations, it ensures reliable connectivity with download speeds up to 220 Mbps and latency as low as 25 ms. The kit includes a phased-array antenna, a Wi-Fi 6 router, and easy setup tools, making installation seamless. With IP67-rated weather resistance, it performs efficiently in various conditions. Whether for streaming, gaming, or remote work, Starlink Standard Kit provides uninterrupted internet access where traditional broadband is unavailable.

newYearSale.name: Samsung 8kg Fully Automatic Top Load Washing Machine
newYearSale.description: The Samsung 8kg Fully Automatic Top Load Washing Machine is a versatile and efficient appliance designed for modern laundry needs.
newYearSale.fullDescription: The Samsung 8kg Fully Automatic Top Load Washing Machine is a versatile and efficient appliance designed for modern laundry needs. Features top load design, fully automatic functionality, 8kg capacity suitable for medium households, and digital inverter technology for energy efficiency.

newYearSale.name: BINATONE STABILIZER DVS-2000
newYearSale.description: Protect your valuable electronics from power fluctuations with the BINATONE STABILIZER DVS-2000.
newYearSale.fullDescription: Protect your valuable electronics from power fluctuations with the BINATONE STABILIZER DVS-2000. Designed with advanced CPU control circuitry, this 2000VA stabilizer ensures accurate output regulation and full protection against high voltage, low voltage, short circuits and overheating.
